column9: row_number() over(partition by settle_bizdate,purge_bizdate order by eetp.extend_purge_bizdate_win desc) as row_id

column8: join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date   --tickets whose payment due date is after the branch closing date are affected

column9: AND t1.settle_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date   --tickets pay after the reopening date are not affected by the delayed purge

column6: where t2.row_id = 1   --When closing multiple times, take the one that was closed most recently
and CASE WHEN t2.purge_bizdate >= t2.extend_purge_bizdate_win THEN t2.purge_bizdate

column3: WHERE CASE WHEN t3.extend_purge_bizdate_win IS NULL THEN srt.purge_bizdate
